archetype.label: display name
archetype.allowed_types: optional list of character type ids; omit = all types
archetype.weights: core category weight vector for procedural spend
archetype.tag_affinities: tag slug → multiplier for all tagged traits

sub_archetype.count: at least 2 per primary; only include subs with a distinct theme
sub_archetype.label: display name — should read clearly at a glance

modifiers.weights: additive deltas applied to parent weights
modifiers.attribute_biases: additive deltas applied to parent attribute_biases
modifiers.skill_biases: additive deltas applied to parent skill_biases
modifiers.discipline_biases: additive deltas applied to parent discipline_biases
